gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/181)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/181)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَدْ عَرَفْتَ حَالِي وَ سَعَةَ يَدِي وَ تَوَسُّعِي عَلَى إِخْوَانِي فَأَصْحَبُ النَّفَرَ مِنْهُمْ فِي طَرِيقِ مَكَّةَ فَأَتَوَسَّعُ عَلَيْهِمْ قَالَ لَا تَفْعَلْ يَا شِهَابُ إِنْ بَسَطْتَ وَ بَسَطُوا أَجْحَفْتَ بِهِمْ وَ إِنْ أَمْسَكُوا أَذْلَلْتَهُمْ فَاصْحَبْ نُظَرَاءَكَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Al Hassan Bin Al husayn Al lulu’ie, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Huzayfa Bin Mansour, from Shihab Bin Abd Rabbih who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘You<sup>asws</sup> have recognised my (affluent) state and the extent of my (helping) hand and my extending (favours) upon my brethren. So, can I accompany a number of them in the road to Makkah, so that I can extend (favours) upon them?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Don’t do it, O Shihab! If you extend and they extend, you would aggrieve them; and if they withhold, you would (end up) humiliating them. Therefore, accompany your equals’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from al-Hassan ibn al-Husayn al-Lu’lu’iy from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Hudhayfah ibn Mansur from Shihab ibn ‘Abd Rabbihi who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘You are aware of my affluent condition and my extending helping hand toward my brothers (in belief). Should I accompany certain individuals from among them during my journey to Makkah and extend a helpful hand toward them?’ He (the Imam) replied, ’You must not do so, O Shihab. If you do so, they will also do it, you overburden them, and if they did not do so, you have humiliated them. Therefore, accompany people like yourself.”’
